summary: Zombie/gore game with a main menu and in-game ESC pause menu. From the main menu, clicking 'Start Game' launches directly into gameplay (ESC menu closed). During gameplay, pressing ESC pauses the game until the player resumes.
architectural_notes: Main menu has a 'Start Game' button that transitions directly to gameplay
ESC key during gameplay opens a pause menu; game resumes when dismissed

existing_features.title: During active gameplay, pressing the ESC key must pause the game and display the PauseOverlay. The game must remain paused (enemies frozen, timers stopped) until the player explicitly clicks the resume button, which dismisses the overlay and resumes gameplay.

new_feature_requests.summary: Start Game from main menu goes directly into gameplay without opening ESC menu
Pressing ESC during gameplay pauses the game until the player resumes
When the player clicks 'Start Game' from the main menu, the game must launch directly into active gameplay with the pause overlay closed and no ESC/pause menu visible.
